content: AI SDK v6 (ai@latest, 2026): source parts are type='source-url' with sourceId field (not type='source'). convertToModelMessages() is async, must be awaited. useChat from '@ai-sdk/react', DefaultChatTransport from 'ai'. Status: submitted|streaming|ready|error (no isLoading). sendMessage({ text }) for submission.

AI SDK v6 SourceUrlUIPart only carries sourceId/url/title. No custom metadata like favicons. convertToModelMessages is async. useChat status values: submitted|streaming|ready|error. sendMessage({ text }) for submission.
